steps.title: Find the temporal anchor
steps.content: ”On August 15, 2013” is a specific past date. This temporal marker determines which verb tense to use.

steps.title: Match the tense to the time
steps.content: The rule is that verb tense must align with the time reference. 'Published' is correct—it uses simple past to match the 2013 date. The other three violate this alignment by using future or present tense forms. This matches choice B — B is correct.
